productDisplayName: Skechers Men's Off White Lifestyle Shoe
description: The casual slip-on shoe is back with a bang with this pair from skechers. Crafted from a a two-toned smooth leather upper with stylishly dyed overlays, this shoe makes for a great addition to your casual wardrobe.UpperLeather upper with suede overlaysSlip-on style for ease of wearContrast coloured side stripes with stitch detailing for added shoe structureElastic gores on the sides of the tongue to offers a customised FitErgonomically relaxed step footbed for all-day comfort MidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole with multi-directional lugs throughout for absolute grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, dry cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner if neededDo not store in direct sunlight
